name: claude-lsp
description: Unified LSP plugin for Claude Code. Enables real-time code intelligence for any combination of languages — configure once, activate only what you need.

languages.title: Enabled languages
languages.description: Languages to enable LSP support for. Supported values: rust, go, typescript, python, lua, c-cpp, java, ruby, php, html, css, yaml. The corresponding binary must be installed — see https://github.com/0xankit/claude-lsp for install commands.
